businessEntitySearch.cta: Search District of Columbia Business Entities

secretaryOfState.agency: District of Columbia Department of Licensing and Consumer Protection (DLCP) Corporations Division
secretaryOfState.officialName: Department of Licensing and Consumer Protection

hours.regular: Monday-Friday, 8:30 a.m.-4:30 p.m. (walk-in service on select days)

renewals.notes: DC requires a BRA-25 biennial report: first due April 1 of the calendar year after registration, then April 1 every two years thereafter. Fee $300; late fee $100. File via CorpOnline.

filingFacts.llcFeeNotes: Domestic LLC Certificate of Organization (Form DLC-1): $99 (DLCP Corporations Division Fees — Limited Liability Company).
filingFacts.nameReservationNotes: Reservation or transfer of name: $50 (DLCP LLC fee schedule).

sources.name: DLCP Corporations Division Fees - Limited Liability Company
